name: Tyrant's Tummyache
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>暴</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぼう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>君</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>くん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>暴</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぼう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>飲</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>暴</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぼう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>食</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Activate by Tributing 1 monster. Neither player can Special Summon a Level 6 or higher monster. If you have 3 or more cards in your hand, destroy this card.
